name: Hot Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Tomato juice or vegetable juice cocktail
2 packages Instant beef broth or 2 Beef bouillon cubes, crumbled
2 medium Ripe tomatoes, peeled and chopped
1/4 cup Wine vinegar or cider vinegar
a few drops Tabasco sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tomato juice in a non-metallic soup tureen or deep 1-1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish.
2. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 6 minutes or until boiling.
3. Stir in bouillon cubes until dissolved. Add the chopped tomatoes, green pepper, onion, vinegar, olive oil, salt, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, and garlic.
4. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
5. Serve accompanied by croutons and chopped tomato, cucumber, onion, and green pepper.
